summary: Iteration 2 backend testing complete. 17 new pytest tests added for menu-based features (mark-all-read, meetings, reminders) + full regression of iter-1 endpoints. 37/37 tests PASS (100%). All new endpoints properly auth-gated (401 without bearer), exclude MongoDB _id, and behave as spec'd. WebSocket 'read' and 'message' broadcasts verified live for both mark-all-read and meeting-with-chat_id flows.

minor.issue: Still-present dead endpoint from iter-1 (returns null). Not exercised by new tests.

action_items: No blocking issues. Optional cleanup: remove dead GET /api/auth/me handler (already flagged in iter-1).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py meetings/reminders store starts_at/remind_at as raw strings, not datetime. Sorting is lexicographic — works for ISO-8601 with a Z suffix but will silently break if the frontend ever sends offsets like '+05:30' or truncates the seconds. Consider parsing to datetime on write.

POST /api/meetings with a chat_id where the user is NOT a member silently no-ops the message broadcast (chat lookup returns None) but still creates the meeting. Better to 404 or ignore the chat_id explicitly; today it looks like success while the chat side-effect never happened.
mark-all-read does one update_many per chat in a loop; fine for MVP but a single {chat_id: {$in: [...]}} + one broadcast pass would be cheaper for users with many chats.
seed_data_creation: Reuses conftest.py session fixture (TEST_alice/bob/carol users + sessions). Added autouse session-scope teardown in test_menu_features.py to remove all TEST_ meetings/reminders after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://chat-kotlin-react.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth: seed users+sessions directly in Mongo (see conftest _mk_user). Run full backend regression via `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v`. New endpoints validated: POST /api/chats/mark-all-read, POST/GET /api/meetings (with & without chat_id — with chat_id posts a formatted message + WS broadcast), POST/GET /api/reminders. Sorting checked: meetings by starts_at asc, reminders by remind_at asc.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs. All spec'd behaviours (bulk read, WS 'read' fan-out, meeting message broadcast, sort order, auth 401, _id exclusion, owner scoping) verified green.
